etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "limit" + "-ed" from Latin "limitare" (to bound, restrict)

etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Bound restrict → restricted constrained → contemporary limited restriction and limited constrained that benefits from freedom growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Bound restrict → restricted constrained → limited restriction → freedom understanding
